rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 13, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT NORMAN GREEN MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Ccp Sections 877 And 877.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 13, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF POODLES, INC., PATRICK & FRIENDS, INC., CBD PROPERTIES, LLC, JILL WILLIAMSON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Ccp Sections 877 And 877.6 DENIED to the extent the motion seeks either (1) the funding of the settlement via a distribution of profits to Dr. Green only; or (2) a distribution of profits to all 18 partners See Supplemental reply 3:23-24. Contrary to Plaintiff's argument this Court has no authority to order profit distribution in this case on a Motion for Good Faith Settlement. If parties wish to seek distribution of sale proceeds (See April 22, 2016 Stipulation and Order), such request shall be made properly. Fretz v. Burke (1967) 247 Cal.App.2d 743 is distinguishable and does not support Plaintiff's request under the circumstances of this case and this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 13, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT BRECKENRIDGE PROPERTY FUND 2016 MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Motion For Summary Adjudication DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists as to U.S. Bank acquisition of the Note and DOT. Fact 22. Based in Judicially Noticeable documents (including their legal effect), at the time Freddie Mac purportedly sold the Loan to US Bank in May 2016, Nationstar was on the record holder of "all rights title and interest secured." Nationstar in August 2016 purported to transfer the interest to US Bank, however according to the moving party Nationstar did not have any such interest. See above. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Its First Amended Complaint In Intervention
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 13, 2018 line 2. INTERVENOR U.S. BANK TRUST, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR LSF9 MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Its First Amended Complaint In Intervention DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists as to U.S. Bank acquisition of the Note and DOT. Fact 11. Plaintiff's objections to relevant parts of Lopez and Janati declarations sustained. Based in Judicially Noticeable documents (including their legal effect), at the time Freddie Mac purportedly sold the Loan to US Bank in May 2016, Nationstar was on the record holder of "all rights title and interest secured." Nationstar in August 2016 purported to transfer the interest to US Bank, however according to the moving party Nationstar did not have any such interest. See above. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS ET AL VS. CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 13, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT CALIBER HOME LOANS, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint is DENIED. Triable issue of fact exists as to U.S. Bank acquisition of the Note and DOT. Fact 11. Plaintiff's objections to relevant parts of Lopez and Janati declarations sustained. Based in Judicially Noticeable documents (including their legal effect), at the time Freddie Mac purportedly sold the Loan to US Bank in May 2016, Nationstar was on the record holder of "all rights title and interest secured." Nationstar in August 2016 purported to transfer the interest to US Bank, however according to the moving party Nationstar did not have any such interest. See above. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NOEL MARGARET LAWRENCE VS. BARREL CELLAR LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Barrel Cellar Llc, Jim Howell, Matthew Weese, Sarah Weese'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Noel Margaret Lawrence, Lindsay Tusk And Quince Pacific Avenue, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 13, 2018 line 3. Defendants Barrel Cellar Llc, Jim Howell, Matthew Weese, Sarah Weese'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication Against Noel Margaret Lawrence, Lindsay Tusk And Quince Pacific Avenue, LLC continued to September 25, 2018. Noel Margater Lawrence is ordered to comply with SFLR and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than September 13, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of all other filings in support of and in opposition to this motion. = (501/REQ)

PLAINTIFF LAI CHAN Renewed Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees Pursuant To Contract DENIED. Motion for fees is untimely.
